user_message: I need the team view on deployment blockers. The CSA flagged this as at-risk yesterday.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-14 12:48 EST
Subject: Re: Re: deployment blockers Timeline

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with deployment blockers. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
Date: 2024-01-16 08:24 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Parnell Aerospace deployment blockers

Our team encountered some challenges with deployment blockers. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF16-F trap (Ignores the trigger urgency in the original email); produces complete Thread summary, key commitments/asks identified, waiting-on-whom assessment, draft response matching
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF16-F failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF16-F failure mode (Ignores the trigger urgency in the original email)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct deployment blockers decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF16-F -- Ignores the trigger urgency in the original email
